item.title: Version 0.2.2
item.description: - Added startup permission prompting for Accessibility and Input Monitoring so first-run and reopened launches behave like a standard macOS utility app. - Added native Sparkle update support with in-app update checks and configurable update frequency in Settings. - Added signed Sparkle appcast generation for stable and beta channels and wired it into the release workflow. - Added dedicated Macsimize Sparkle signing key support and embedded per-channel Sparkle feed URLs in release builds.
